tiers.name: Discover & Introspect
tiers.summary: Read JSON Schemas for every connection type and config, then introspect real source data — list tables, inspect columns, preview rows, run read-only SQL. The agent never guesses.

capabilities.name: Discover
capabilities.description: Meta endpoints return full JSON Schema for every connection type, dlt config, dbt test, and materialization.

capabilities.name: Introspect
capabilities.description: List source tables, inspect column types, preview sample rows, and execute read-only SQL.

tiers.name: Build
tiers.summary: Full CRUD for every resource the agent needs to assemble a pipeline: connections, uploads, pipelines, transformations, schedules, notification channels.

capabilities.name: Build
capabilities.description: Create and update connections, uploads, pipelines, transformations, schedules, and notification channels.

tiers.name: Validate
tiers.summary: Compile dbt transformations to catch Jinja and ref errors, preview rows without touching production. Typed error codes let the agent branch on failures.

capabilities.name: Validate
capabilities.description: Compile dbt SQL without executing, then preview output rows in a sandbox. Typed error codes.

tiers.name: Execute & Control
tiers.summary: Trigger runs synchronously with `?wait=true`, cancel stuck runs, retry safely with Idempotency-Key headers, monitor history, and browse the auto-generated catalog.

capabilities.name: Execute
capabilities.description: Trigger runs with optional ?wait=true for synchronous completion (default 120s, max 300s).

capabilities.name: Control
capabilities.description: Cancel runs, monitor run history, stream logs, browse the data catalog.

tiers.name: Machine-Readable Discovery
tiers.summary: Plain-text and Markdown documents an LLM agent can fetch without auth to learn the API surface, golden-path loop, error codes, and tier structure before it has an API key.

capabilities.name: Discover Docs
capabilities.description: Plain-text discovery, agent strategy guide, OpenAPI spec, and the agent-tiers JSON endpoint.

golden_path: `GET /api/v1/meta/connection-types` — discover available source and destination types with their config schemas
`GET /api/v1/catalog` — discover loaded tables in the destination
`POST /api/v1/schedules` — schedule the pipeline on a cron

error_codes.action: Check table names and SQL syntax
Check field types and required fields

ui_only_operations: **Organization creation** — orgs are created via the signup flow
